Global (All).title: US-Iran tensions escalate after drone attack
Global (All).summary: Tensions between the US and Iran have escalated after a drone attack on a US contractor in Syria.

Global (All).title: Global COVID-19 cases surge past 2 million in past 7 days
Global (All).summary: The number of global COVID-19 cases has surged past 2 million in the past 7 days, with many countries experiencing new outbreaks.

Global (All).title: Protests erupt in France over pension reform
Global (All).summary: Protests have erupted in France over a proposed pension reform, with thousands taking to the streets across the country.

United States.title: US Federal Judge Temporarily Blocks Alabama's Near-Total Abortion Ban
US Officials Say Iranian Hacker Group Tried to Hack State Unemployment Offices
US Senate Passes Bill to Prevent Rail Strike

South Korea.title: North Korean Missile Test Sparks Global Concern
South Korea.summary: South Korea's military said it detected the launch of a suspected ballistic missile from North Korea. The launch came as a surprise, with the US and South Korea expecting a longer delay between the end of the joint military exercises and any potential test.

South Korea.title: South Korea's President Yoon Suk-yeol Under Fire for His Handling of Raccoon Dog Crisis
South Korea.summary: South Korea's president is facing criticism for his response to the raccoon dog virus outbreak. The virus has killed 2 people and infected more than 200 in the country.

South Korea.title: South Korea and US Begin Drills Despite China's Warning
South Korea.summary: South Korea and the US have started joint military drills, ignoring China's warning to call them off. The US and South Korea see the drills as a necessary response to the threat from North Korea.

Japan.title: Japan earthquake and tsunami warning
Japan.summary: A powerful earthquake struck Japan, triggering a tsunami warning and displacing thousands of people.

Japan.title: Protests erupt in Tokyo over government reforms
Japan.summary: Thousands of protesters took to the streets in Tokyo to express their discontent with the government's proposed reforms.

Japan.title: Rising tensions between Japan and China over disputed islands
Japan.summary: Japan and China are at odds over the ownership of disputed islands, sparking concerns about a potential military conflict.
